beats.say: The return isn't a return. It's recontextualization. No loading, no transition — just silence, then structure, then awareness of space. You're at workstation 7B.

But it isn't identical to before. The lighting runs a little warmer. The desk has shifted a few centimeters. A filing terminal that was off is now active. Nothing is labeled as changed. Everything simply is different.

beats.sys:
Reintegration Complete
Memory Instance L-1184: Stored
Interpretation Layer: Active
Drift Index: Elevated

beats.say: You're back sooner than expected. That usually means one of two things.

beats.label: b_what
beats.say: You entered a stable contradiction field. And you chose how it resolves. So now it believes you.

beats.label: b_saw
beats.say: I see all of them, in pieces. What matters is that you resolved it — and a resolved memory doesn't stay where you left it.

beats.label: b_changed
beats.say: Something did. You did. Don't fight the feeling that the room is reloading instead of remembering — that feeling means it worked.

beats.label: b_floor
beats.say: A Keeper passes the desk, glances at you. 'You touched a lantern instance?' Not an accusation — a classification. He keeps walking before you can answer.
That's going to spread faster than expected.

beats.sys:
LANTERN INSTANCE CLASSIFIED
CONTINUITY INTEGRATION COMPLETE
SECONDARY VARIANTS GENERATED: 3

beats.say: Across the floor, two clerks argue quietly. 'That corridor didn't exist yesterday.' 'It always did.' Neither wins. They keep working.
She pushes the file toward you — not to read. To acknowledge. 'You understand now it wasn't just a case.' A pause. 'It was a template.'
